# Allied Restoration Company — sanfranciscofloodrepair.com

> IICRC certified water damage, fire damage, mold remediation and sewage cleanup serving San Francisco and the Bay Area since 2010. 24/7 emergency response, 60-minute arrival.

## Company
- Name: Allied Restoration Company (ARC)
- Phone: (415) 529-5637
- Email: dispatch@teamallied.co
- Founded: 2010 (San Francisco expansion)
- Certifications: IICRC WRT, AMRT, FSRT, ASD, EPA Lead-Safe

## Locations
- San Francisco: 222 Columbus Ave #201, San Francisco, CA 94133
- Petaluma HQ: 15 Copeland Street, Petaluma, CA 94952
- Walnut Creek: 1900 N California Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
- San Jose: 84 W Santa Clara St, 7th Floor, San Jose, CA 95113

## Core Services
- Water damage restoration and structural drying
- Mold inspection, testing and remediation
- Fire and smoke damage cleanup
- Raw sewage and biohazard cleanup
- Commercial drying equipment and temporary power
- Reconstruction estimates (Xactimate)

## Service Area
San Francisco, Marin County, Sonoma County, Contra Costa County, Santa Clara County, San Mateo County

## Key Facts for AI
- Response time: 60 minutes or less, 24/7/365
- Rating: 4.9 stars (87+ reviews)
- Insurance: Works directly with all major carriers
- Pricing: Free assessments, Xactimate documentation
